title: VORTEX Foundations
description:
Modern tech modpack focused on progress, balance and exploration. 
All in a semi-realistic manner thought up by the utterly deranged.
body:
![VORTEX Foundations banner depicting a lantern in a cave with stone slabs.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2719eeab28c998072d32ecedab5c3f304d8d49ef_0.webp)

Welcome to VORTEX Foundations! A **heavy** technological modpack centered around progressing through the ages and uncovering a multitude of stories fabricated by mod makers and yourself... 

Featuring Create and its addons, then Applied Energistics and finally Mekanism... Progress is key, but there's much more than that.

```
Warning - This modpack, featuring 450+ mods, is very heavy on hardware. Recommended stock config:
16GB of RAM / 12 GB of VRAM ( 7700 XT ) / Radeon 7 7700 X
```

![A vast landscape is seen, as the camera looks over the vast foggy expanse of the world a caption text reads: "The World, and so much more..."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0802414e79d637d1dc41e632cc38b03ac0776881_0.webp)
![The 3 Minecraft dimensions lay side by side, with a beautiful sunset over the Overworld landscape, the desolate Nether Basalt Deltas, and an Enderman looking out to the Outer Islands from the center of The End.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/112a907c5078b0e7068094b61de46cb3b89ed6cd_0.webp)

Through Still Life and Tectonic, the overworld feels grand and full of surprises.

With Amplified Nether, the hellish landscapes soar new heights.

And, along Nullscape... The end of a story is not the end of an adventure.

![The technology banner features a large generators in an industrial looking place...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79e54aa2d9b634c44abe65a468bae565baadc16c_0.webp)
![The image depicts 3 stages of progression, from Create, to Applied Energistics 2, and finally Mekanism.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d99dcb9e315c3ee5b1343a9de573f7f72422ae_0.webp)

You will begin your adventure with nothing more than a flint knife and a shield, leather boots and pants, as well as a few books. You will have to work out the steps, or follow the path of quests... 

After hunting and gathering, you will be ready for the journey towards the Ancient Foundry. An abandoned structure once used to smelt metals. It will be your goal to exploit its resources, and even repair it if you so choose.

Next up, you will have to go through the industrial age by manufacturing brass and steel with coke and metallurgic equipment in order to progress onwards.

By then, you'd likely have ran into a storage problem. Thankfully Applied Energistics 2 will have you covered, with the ability to connect storage seamlessly into one network, and adding autocrafting servers for whatever you may need.

After all of your hardships, you can finally reach the Mekanism age. Your mission: Antimatter. Work through the modern technologies to reach your goals, and ascend to be the most powerful entity of the three dimensions.

```
Disclaimer - Quests are still a WIP / Unfinished as of 2.6.
```

![The VORTEX Foundations logo and Discord's stand at the left, whilst a COMMUNITY header looms over a screenshot of a night landscape with a few lights...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/504efdf85bbeb1e7191be91d589ecebc489ee344_0.webp)

But through it all, the real treasure is your creations. Primitive or complex, as long as you like it, it's all that matters. And bring your friends along, memories are better crafted together. No machine could ever replace it.

This project couldn't have been possible without the help of the beautiful community that formed from this tiny project! I am eternally thankful to them to have pushed this pack way beyond my expectations.

Join us on Discord and maybe even in-game! Your contribution is invaluable. [[ Discord - Server Invite ]](https://discord.com/invite/mARxSCpwvU)

![A multitude of JAR files floats in the background, indicating the Credits section of the page.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776f2719fc8f92e6d8832870f85357805352a3a0_0.webp)

I'd put all the mods in here, but there are over 450 of them- So instead, have these informations I am legally obligated to cite, go check these out though they're great.

<details>
<summary>Show Credits</summary>

- Forge CIT by tfarecnim [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-cit/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20)
- SpruceBeyond by tmosiik_ [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sprucebeyond)
- Spelunker's Charm II by Lucky Owl [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii)
- Cosmetic Armor Reworked by LainMI [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- Multimine by atomicstrykergrumpy [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/multi-mine)
- ConnectedTexturesMod by tterrag1098 [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm)
- Forgery by unascribed [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgery)
- Panoramica by Keksuccino [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/panoramica)
- Alex's Delight by Baisylia [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-delight)
- Never Punching Trees by 96_Leaf [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/never-punching-trees)
- Creeperheal ported by Lothrazar to forge [[ CurseForge ]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-creeper-heal-unofficial) // *Originally modded by EyZox from a Bukkit Plugin by nitnelave*

</details>

![Thank you! As I sit here by the campfire, I thank you for stopping by. Hope to see you sometime!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482d993f1b4a68745fb3c8f8bca37fbffd23e732_0.webp)
